tools.name: claims.claimDevicesByClaimCode
tools.description:
Adds device(s) to your account (i.e., claim one or more devices) if and only if you
 received a claim code with the device(s).

tools.name: devices.describeDevice
tools.description:
Given a device ID, returns a DescribeDeviceResponse object describing the
 details of the device.

tools.name: devices.finalizeDeviceClaim
tools.description:
Given a device ID, finalizes the claim request for the associated device.

Claiming a device consists of initiating a claim, then publishing a device event, and finalizing the claim. For a device of type button, a device event can be published by simply clicking the device.

tools.name: devices.getDeviceMethods
tools.description: Given a device ID, returns the invokable methods associated with the device.

tools.name: devices.initiateDeviceClaim
tools.description:
Given a device ID, initiates a claim request for the associated device.

Claiming a device consists of initiating a claim, then publishing a device event, and finalizing the claim. For a device of type button, a device event can be published by simply clicking the device.

tools.name: devices.invokeDeviceMethod
tools.description:
Given a device ID, issues a request to invoke a named device method (with possible
 parameters). See the "Example POST" code snippet below.

tools.name: devices.listDeviceEvents
tools.description:
Using a device ID, returns a DeviceEventsResponse object containing an
 array of events for the device.

tools.name: devices.listDevices
tools.description: Lists the 1-Click compatible devices associated with your AWS account.

tools.name: devices.unclaimDevice
tools.description: Disassociates a device from your AWS account using its device ID.

tools.name: devices.updateDeviceState
tools.description:
Using a Boolean value (true or false), this operation
 enables or disables the device given a device ID.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags associated with the specified resource ARN.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds or updates the tags associated with the resource ARN. See AWS IoT 1-Click Service Limits for the maximum number of tags allowed per resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description:
Using tag keys, deletes the tags (key/value pairs) associated with the specified
 resource ARN.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
